title: pyrus froebelii
intro: Pyrus froebelii, also known as the Froebel's pear or mountain pear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pyrus froebelii include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Pyrus froebelii can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
